originalTitle: 3 Reasons to Sell TDC and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Teradata trades at $32.43 per share and has stayed right on track with the overall market, gaining 13.2% over the last six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 has returned 9.8%.
content:
Teradata trades at $32.43 per share and has stayed right on track with the overall market, gaining 13.2% over the last six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 has returned 9.8%.

Is there a buying opportunity in Teradata, or does it present a risk to your portfolio? Check out our in-depth research report to see what our analysts have to say, it’s free .

What's causing Teradata's operating margins to shrink significantly?

What makes Teradata's current valuation risky despite reasonable metrics?

Why is Teradata's cash flow margin expected to decline?

Why are Teradata's billings showing weak demand growth?

Why Do We Think Teradata Will Underperform?

We’re cautious about Teradata. Here are three reasons we avoid TDC, plus one stock we’d rather own.

1. Weak Billings Point to Soft Demand

Billings is a non-GAAP metric that is often called “cash revenue” because it shows how much money the company has collected from customers in a certain period. This is different from revenue, which must be recognized in pieces over the length of a contract.

Teradata’s billings came in at $515 million in Q1, and over the last four quarters, its year-on-year growth averaged 3.7%. This performance was underwhelming and suggests that increasing competition is causing challenges in acquiring/retaining customers.

While many software businesses point investors to their adjusted profits, which exclude stock-based compensation (SBC), we prefer GAAP operating margin because SBC is a legitimate expense used to attract and retain talent. This is one of the best measures of profitability because it shows how much money a company takes home after developing, marketing, and selling its products.

Looking at the trend in its profitability, Teradata’s operating margin decreased by 7.2 percentage points over the last two years. Even though its historical margin was healthy, shareholders will want to see Teradata become more profitable in the future. Its operating margin for the trailing 12 months was 6.1%.

If you’ve followed StockStory for a while, you know we emphasize free cash flow. Why, you ask? We believe that in the end, cash is king, and you can’t use accounting profits to pay the bills.

Over the next year, analysts predict Teradata’s cash conversion will fall. Their consensus estimates imply its free cash flow margin of 39.6% for the last 12 months will decrease to 18.6%.

We see the value of companies addressing major business pain points, but in the case of Teradata, we’re out. That said, the stock currently trades at 1.9× forward price-to-sales (or $32.43 per share). This valuation is reasonable, but the company’s shaky fundamentals present too much downside risk. There are superior stocks to buy right now. We’d suggest looking at the most entrenched endpoint security platform on the market .

Stocks We Would Buy Instead of Teradata

ONE MORE THING: Top 6 Stocks for This Week. This market is separating quality stocks from expensive ones fast. AI is taking down whole sectors with no warning. In a rotation this fast, you need more than a list of good companies.

Our AI system flagged Palantir before it ran 1,662%. AppLovin before it ran 753%. Nvidia before it ran 1,178%. Each week it produces 6 new names that pass the same tests. Get Our Top 6 Stocks for Free HERE .

Stocks that have made our list include now familiar names such as Nvidia (+1,326% between June 2020 and June 2025) as well as under-the-radar businesses like the once-small-cap company Comfort Systems (+782% five-year return). Find your next big winner with StockStory today .
chineseTitle: 出售 TDC 的 3 个理由和买入 1 只股票的理由
chineseSummary: Teradata 的交易价格为每股 32.43 美元，与整体市场保持一致，在过去六个月中上涨了 13.2%。与此同时，标准普尔 500 指数的回报率为 9.8%。
chineseContent:
Teradata 的交易价格为每股 32.43 美元，与整体市场保持一致，在过去六个月中上涨了 13.2%。与此同时，标准普尔 500 指数的回报率为 9.8%。

Teradata 是否存在购买机会，或者是否会给您的投资组合带来风险？查看我们的深入研究报告，看看我们的分析师怎么说，它是免费的。

是什么导致 Teradata 的营业利润大幅缩水？

尽管指标合理，但是什么导致 Teradata 目前的估值存在风险？

为什么 Teradata 的现金流利润率预计会下降？

为什么 Teradata 的账单显示需求增长疲弱？

为什么我们认为 Teradata 会表现不佳？

我们对 Teradata 持谨慎态度。以下是我们避免 TDC 的三个原因，以及我们宁愿持有的一只股票。

1. 疲软的账单表明需求疲软

比林斯是一个非公认会计原则指标，通常被称为“现金收入”，因为它显示了公司在特定时期从客户那里收取了多少钱。这与收入不同，收入必须在合同期内分段确认。

Teradata 第一季度的营收为 5.15 亿美元，过去四个季度的同比平均增长率为 3.7%。这种表现并不令人印象深刻，表明日益激烈的竞争正在给获取/留住客户带来挑战。

虽然许多软件企业向投资者指出调整后的利润，其中不包括基于股票的薪酬 (SBC)，但我们更喜欢 GAAP 营业利润率，因为 SBC 是用于吸引和留住人才的合法费用。这是衡量盈利能力的最佳指标之一，因为它显示了一家公司在开发、营销和销售其产品后赚了多少钱。

从盈利趋势来看，Teradata的营业利润率在过去两年下降了7.2个百分点。尽管其历史利润率很高，但股东仍希望看到 Teradata 在未来变得更加盈利。过去 12 个月的营业利润率为 6.1%。

如果您关注 StockStory 一段时间，您就会知道我们强调自由现金流。你问为什么？我们相信，归根结底，现金为王，你不能用会计利润来支付账单。

分析师预测，明年 Teradata 的现金转化率将会下降。他们的一致估计意味着过去 12 个月 39.6% 的自由现金流利润率将下降至 18.6%。

我们看到了公司解决主要业务痛点的价值，但就 Teradata 而言，我们已经出局了。也就是说，该股目前的交易价格是远期市销率的 1.9 倍（即每股 32.43 美元）。这一估值是合理的，但该公司不稳定的基本面带来了太大的下行风险。现在有优质股票可供购买。我们建议考虑市场上最根深蒂固的端点安全平台。

我们会购买而不是 Teradata 的股票

还有一件事：本周排名前 6 的股票。这个市场正在快速地将优质股票与昂贵股票分开。人工智能正在毫无预警地摧毁整个行业。在如此快速的轮换中，您需要的不仅仅是一份优秀公司的名单。

我们的 AI 系统在 Palantir 运行 1,662% 之前对其进行了标记。 AppLovin之前的运行率为753%。此前英伟达的股价为 1,178%。每周都会产生 6 个通过相同测试的新名字。在此免费获取我们的前 6 名股票。

进入我们名单的股票包括现在熟悉的名字，如 Nvidia（2020 年 6 月至 2025 年 6 月期间增长 1,326%），以及曾经不为人知的企业，如曾经的小盘股公司 Comfort Systems（五年回报率增长 782%）。立即通过 StockStory 寻找您的下一个大赢家。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
